title: chore(deps): bump @modelcontextprotocol/sdk from 1.25.2 to 1.26.0 in /scripts/gh-issue-triage
summary: Dependabot PR bumping @modelcontextprotocol/sdk from 1.25.2 to 1.26.0 in the standalone scripts/gh-issue-triage directory. Only changes package-lock.json. The v1.26.0 release includes a security fix for GHSA-345p-7cg4-v4c7 (cross-client response data leakage when sharing server/transport instances). Also pulls in transitive dependency updates (express-rate-limit 7->8, hono added, ip-address added).
maintainerNotes: This PR has merge conflicts and automatic rebases have been disabled since it's been open >30 days. A maintainer needs to comment `@dependabot rebase` or `@dependabot recreate` to resolve conflicts. The scope is limited to scripts/gh-issue-triage (not a workspace package), so risk is minimal. Note PR #12684 bumps the same SDK version in the main workspace. The CI failures (Bird Checker evals, Vercel assistant-ui) appear unrelated to this change. The underlying SDK update addresses a security advisory, which adds urgency.
